variants: Teagan Hartsfield was born in Gingerbark Fields and pursued her passion for the arts at the Moonspire Arts Institute, where she honed her creative skills. After completing her education, she became a valued team member at Thornfield Transport, contributing her unique vision to the company. Currently, she resides in Starcaller Crescent, where she enjoys the serene atmosphere that sparks her creativity. Her dedication and talent were recognized when she received the Dawnbringer Emblem for her contributions to the industry.
